endpoints.name: GET /v1/CompositionHooks
endpoints.description: List of all Recording CompositionHook resources.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/CompositionHooks
endpoints.description: Recording composition hooks
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/CompositionHooks/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Returns a single CompositionHook resource identified by a CompositionHook SID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/CompositionHooks/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Recording composition hooks
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v1/CompositionHooks/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Delete a Recording CompositionHook resource identified by a `CompositionHook SID`.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/Rooms
endpoints.description: Video rooms with one or more participants
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/Rooms
endpoints.description: Video rooms with one or more participants
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/Rooms/{RoomSid}/Participants
endpoints.description: Participants in video rooms
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{ROOMSID}} with a real roomsid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/Rooms/{RoomSid}/Participants/{ParticipantSid}/PublishedTracks
endpoints.description: Returns a list of tracks associated with a given Participant. Only `currently` Published Tracks are in the list resource.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{ROOMSID}} with a real roomsid. Replace {{PARTICIPANTSID}} with a real participantsid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/Rooms/{RoomSid}/Participants/{ParticipantSid}/PublishedTracks/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Returns a single Track resource represented by TrackName or SID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{ROOMSID}} with a real roomsid. Replace {{PARTICIPANTSID}} with a real participantsid. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/Rooms/{RoomSid}/Participants/{ParticipantSid}/SubscribeRules
endpoints.description: Returns a list of Subscribe Rules for the Participant.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{ROOMSID}} with a real roomsid. Replace {{PARTICIPANTSID}} with a real participantsid.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/Rooms/{RoomSid}/Participants/{ParticipantSid}/SubscribeRules
endpoints.description: Update the Subscribe Rules for the Participant
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{ROOMSID}} with a real roomsid. Replace {{PARTICIPANTSID}} with a real participantsid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/Rooms/{RoomSid}/Participants/{ParticipantSid}/SubscribedTracks
endpoints.description: Returns a list of tracks that are subscribed for the participant.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{ROOMSID}} with a real roomsid. Replace {{PARTICIPANTSID}} with a real participantsid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/Rooms/{RoomSid}/Participants/{ParticipantSid}/SubscribedTracks/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Returns a single Track resource represented by `track_sid`.  Note: This is one resource with the Video API that requires a SID, be Track Name on the subscriber side is not guaranteed to be unique.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{ROOMSID}} with a real roomsid. Replace {{PARTICIPANTSID}} with a real participantsid. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/Rooms/{RoomSid}/Participants/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Participants in video rooms
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{ROOMSID}} with a real roomsid. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{ROOMSID}} with a real roomsid. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.
